info.title: ScanCentral DAST API
info.description:
ScanCentral DAST API v2.

Unless otherwise noted, missing properties in a request payload can be expected to default to the data types default value. Boolean data types will default to false, numeric/integer data types will default to 0, string data types will default to an empty string, array data types will default to null and complex objects will default to null.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description:
The format of field filters is: `{field name}:{operator}={value(s)}`

Multiple fields should be separated by a plus (`+`). Multiple fields are treated as an AND condition.

Multiple values for a field should be separated by a pipe (`|`). Mulitple values for a field are treated as an OR condition.

A field may only be used once in the filter list.

Each `value` must be url encoded.

The following operators are available:
- `Eq` (Equal)
- `Ne` (Not Equal)
- `Lt` (Less Than)
- `LtEq` (Less Than or Equal)
- `Gt` (Greater Than)
- `GtEq` (Greater Than or Equal)
- `Between` (Between)
  - Between will return records between two values. The values should be separated by a tilde (`~`)
- `Contains` (Contains)
- `StartsWith` (Starts With)
- `EndsWith` (Ends With)

Available operators by data type:
- `string` (case-insensitive)
  - Eq
  - Ne
  - Contains
  - StartsWith
  - EndsWith
- `numeric`
  - Eq
  - Ne
  - Lt
  - LtEq
  - Gt
  - GtEq
  - Between
  - Contains
  - StartsWith
  - EndsWith
- `DateTime`
  - Eq
  - Ne
  - Lt
  - LtEq
  - Gt
  - GtEq
  - Between
- `enum`
  - Eq
  - Ne

Examples:
- All records where the *id* equals *1* or *25*
  - `id:Eq=1|Eq=25`
- All records where the *id* is between *1* and *25*
  - `id:Between=1~25`
- All records where the *id* equals *1* or *25* and the *name* equals *Html5*
  - `id:Eq=1|eq=25+name:Eq=Html5` 
- All records where the *name* starts with *Html*
  - `name:StartsWith=Html`
- All records where the *name* contains *Scripting*
  - `name:Contains=Scripting`
